response: People with braces cannot manipulate gravity at will because the presence of braces does not alter the fundamental laws of physics that govern gravitational forces. Braces are orthodontic devices designed to correct misaligned teeth and jaws, and they have no effect on a person's ability to interact with or control gravity. Gravity is a natural force exerted by the mass of the Earth, and no dental appliance can influence that. The idea of manipulating gravity at will is currently beyond the realm of human capability and remains a concept explored only in science fiction. weakness.
